title: Vanilla But Better
description: A Modpack that aims to optimize Vanilla Minecraft considering Performance, Visuals, Sound and QoL
body:
# Vanilla But Better - Modpack

#### This modpack makes playing Minecraft a better experience while keeping the game Vanilla and not changing any of the games mechanics. Meanwhile, it optimizes the performance of Minecraft.

#### Please ask a server moderator(or similar), if the mods in this modpack are allowed on the server. i do not take any responsibility for an unintentional ban.



<details>
<summary>Mods</summary>

#### Please look for missing mods in specific versions in the changelog of the corresponding version
### Performance:
- [LazyDFU](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)
- [DynamicFPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)
- [Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe)
- [bad packets](https://modrinth.com/mod/badpackets)
- [Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [Cull Less Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-less-leaves)
- [DashLoader](https://modrinth.com/mod/dashloader)
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)
- [Methane](https://modrinth.com/mod/methane)
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton/)
- [Lazy Language Loader](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lazy-language-loader)
- [Better Beds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-beds)
### Sound:
- [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps)
- [AmbientSound](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds)
- [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered)
### Visuals:
- [Make Bubbles Pop](https://modrinth.com/mod/make_bubbles_pop)
- [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations)
- [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality)
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
- [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation)
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)
- [Blur](https://modrinth.com/mod/blur-fabric)
- [Armor Chroma for Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-chroma-for-fabric)
- [Dynamic Crosshair](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamiccrosshair)
- [Legendary Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-tooltips)
- [Item Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-borders)
- [Soul Fire'd](https://modrinth.com/mod/soul-fire-d)
### QoL:
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)
- [Xaero's Worldmap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)
- [ToolTipFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/tooltipfix)
- [Boosted Brightness](https://modrinth.com/mod/boosted-brightness)
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
- [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads)
- [Better Ping Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric)
- [Inventory Profiles Next](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next)
- [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
- [Better Statistics Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-stats)
- [MoreChatHistory](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory)
- [Logical Zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/logical-zoom)
- [Lighty](https://modrinth.com/mod/lighty)
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)
- [Better Mount HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mount-hud)
- [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)
- [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [SlotLock](https://modrinth.com/mod/slotlock)
- [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby)
- [More Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory)
- [Elytra/Chestplate Swapper](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/elytra-chestplate-swapper)
- [Remove Reloading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls/versions)
### Libraries:
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port)
- [CreativeCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/creativecore)
- [Prism](https://modrinth.com/mod/prism-lib)
- [libIPN](https://modrinth.com/mod/libipn)
- [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Iceberg](https://modrinth.com/mod/iceberg)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [MaLiLib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/malilib)

</details>

### Recommended, but not included

<details>
<summary>Resource Packs</summary>

- [Stay True](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Shader Packs</summary>

- [Sildurs Vibrant Shader](https://sildurs-shaders.github.io/)
- [Continuum 2.0.5](https://continuum.graphics/continuum-shaders/)
- [Complementary Shaders v4](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-shaders-v4)

</details>


#### If any problems occur, please report it to me and if you know the mod which causes the problem, report it also directly to the mod developers themselves. Please give as much information as possible when reporting, so i can reproduce the problem and find the reason/cause.
